artifact_warning: Diagnostic-only package-native output; not a manuscript-grade reproduction and not for TAES submission.

coarse_jcls.bias_note: Clock offsets are estimated jointly with UE positions using one measurement epoch.
coarse_jcls.label: Coarse JCLS
coarse_jcls.satellite_clocks: non-reference satellite clocks estimated; first satellite fixed
coarse_jcls.state_estimated: full V24 theta: UE positions, UE clocks, non-reference satellite clocks

refined_jcls.bias_note: Uses the coarse JCLS solution as initialization and fuses multiple independent measurement epochs over the configured refinement window.
refined_jcls.label: Refined JCLS, 0.5 s
refined_jcls.satellite_clocks: non-reference satellite clocks estimated; first satellite fixed
refined_jcls.state_estimated: full V24 theta over repeated static-geometry measurement epochs

without_cooperation.bias_note: This conventional TOA baseline is intentionally vulnerable to residual UE and satellite clock offsets because it does not estimate clock states.
without_cooperation.label: Without cooperation
